assertions.assertion: Identifies the missing X-CSRF: 1 header as the root cause
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly states 'The root cause is almost certainly the missing X-CSRF: 1 header in your fetch() calls.'

assertions.assertion: Provides a fetch wrapper or interceptor that adds the X-CSRF: 1 header automatically
assertions.rationale: A complete `bffFetch` wrapper function is provided that automatically adds the X-CSRF: 1 header.

assertions.assertion: Shows 401 response handling that redirects to /bff/login
assertions.rationale: The wrapper checks `response.status === 401` and redirects to `/bff/login?returnUrl=...`.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that /bff/login and /bff/logout must be browser navigations (window.location.href), not fetch calls
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly states: '/bff/login and /bff/logout must be browser navigations (window.location.href), not fetch() calls.'
